tasks.title: Add reusable ButtonSpinner component
tasks.description: Create web/src/components/ButtonSpinner.tsx: a tiny wrapper around MUI CircularProgress sized for inline button use (size={16}, thickness ~5, color inherits or var(--attest) on contained/seal-green buttons, sx marginRight to sit before the label). Accept optional size/color props. This is the single spinner reused by every LLM button so the treatment is consistent. No new state — it's a pure presentational glyph shown when the caller's existing loading flag is true. CircularProgress is already a dependency (imported in App.tsx).

tasks.title: Spinner on Upload 'Continue to review' (extract, LLM)
tasks.description: In steps/UploadStep.tsx, render <ButtonSpinner/> inside the Button before the label when the store `loading` flag is true (button already disabled + shows 'Reading your profile…'). Keep existing text; spinner sits beside it. No state change.

tasks.title: Spinner on Posting 'Tailor my CV' (tailor, LLM)
tasks.description: In steps/PostingStep.tsx, add <ButtonSpinner/> to the 'Tailor my CV' button when store `loading` is true (label already swaps to 'Tailoring…'). No state change.

tasks.title: Spinner on DownloadStep cover-letter buttons (cover-letter, LLM)
tasks.description: In steps/DownloadStep.tsx, add <ButtonSpinner/> to the 'Generate cover letter' / 'Regenerate letter' button and the cover-letter blocked 're-check' button when the component-local `letterBusy` flag is true (labels already swap to 'Writing…' / 'Re-checking…'). Drive off letterBusy, not the store flag. No state change.

tasks.title: Spinner on SettingsModal 'Test connection' (settings/test, LLM)
tasks.description: In settings/SettingsModal.tsx, add <ButtonSpinner/> to the 'Test connection' button when test.kind === 'testing' (label already swaps to 'Testing…'). No state change.

tasks.title: Spinner on SettingsModal model 'Reload' (models, LLM)
tasks.description: In settings/SettingsModal.tsx, add <ButtonSpinner/> to the model-list 'Reload' button when the component-local `modelsLoading` flag is true (label already swaps to 'Loading…'). This button lives in an InputAdornment and is small — size the spinner to match. No state change.

tasks.title: Consistency spinners on Confirm & CV render/re-check (not LLM, same wizard)
tasks.description: So the wizard isn't half-spinnered: add <ButtonSpinner/> to steps/ConfirmStep.tsx 'Confirm & continue' (store `loading`, label 'Saving…') and to steps/DownloadStep.tsx CV 'Re-check & continue' button (store `loading`, label 'Re-checking…'). These are guardrail/file/render ops, not LLM — included only for visual consistency across the wizard's async actions. If the user prefers LLM-only, this task can be dropped without affecting the others.

tasks.title: Verify: type-check and build
tasks.description: Run `cd web && npx tsc --noEmit` then `npm run build` and confirm both pass. web/ has no test runner, so type-check + build is the verification gate. Spot-check that CircularProgress import paths resolve and no unused-import lint errors were introduced.

tasks.title: Add status to application API schemas
tasks.description: In api/schemas.py add `status: str = ""` to ApplicationModel and ApplicationCreate, and `status: str | None = None` to ApplicationUpdate (None = leave as-is), matching the existing camelCase alias pattern. Verify api/routes.py create/update handlers pass status through generically (they map EDITABLE / update fields); adjust only if a field is enumerated explicitly.

tasks.title: Update data-model docs for status
tasks.description: In docs/reference/data-model.md, add `status` to the Application record field list (optional, one of Draft|Applied|Waiting|Interviewing|Offer|Rejected, blank when unset). Keep the Application record schema description consistent with the model.

tasks.title: Add status to application API schemas

tasks.title: Add status field to Application model
tasks.description: In applications/model.py, add `status: str = ""` to the Application dataclass (place near submission_type). Add "status" to the EDITABLE tuple so clients can set it on create/update. from_dict/to_dict already iterate dataclass fields, so no further change; confirm a missing status in stored JSON defaults to "".

tasks.title: Cover status in application store tests
tasks.description: In tests/test_applications_store.py, extend existing create/update tests to assert status round-trips: default "" when unset, settable via create and via partial update, and preserved on unrelated updates. Follow the existing test style/fixtures.
